name: @intentsolutionsio/search-to-slack
description: Enhances web_search Skill by posting formatted research digests to Slack channels

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install search-to-slack\\n  or /plugin install search-to-slack@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
